series_metadata.series_description: Amicus briefs filed by the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) to advance the state's position in litigation to which it is not a party. Records include, but are not limited to, drafts, research, correspondence, and other filed documents like briefs and pleadings relating to the case that the brief is referencing.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from case closure and all appeals in related case have exhausted. ; Paper: from case closure and all appeals in related case have exhausted. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
